name: Karen's Sweet Potato Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the sweet potatoes using a food processor or hand grater.
2. In a bowl, blend together the sugar and margarine. Add the well-beaten eggs and mix thoroughly. Gradually add the grated potatoes, milk, corn syrup, and vanilla, blending until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
3. Pour the mixture into a casserole dish. Bake in a preheated oven set to 300 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour, or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean. Serve warm or cold with whipped cream or ice cream if desired.
